body.text: The Cognitive Passport Protocol establishes accountability and provenance for AI-generated content in cognitive prosthetics, ensuring the human operator remains the legal author while using AI as a cognitive prosthetic.
As AI becomes increasingly integrated into cognitive prosthetics, this protocol establishes clear attribution and provenance chains to maintain human agency and legal responsibility.
Human operator as legal author of all deliverables
Cryptographic finality attestation for all AI-generated output
Prohibition on fine-tuning with protected-class user data
All P31 Labs artifacts include Cognitive Passport metadata, establishing an immutable chain of custody from conception to deployment.
This protocol ensures AI remains a tool for human empowerment rather than replacement, aligning with neurodivergent-designed principles of autonomy and sovereignty.
